title: Will the Pentagon’s Anthropic controversy scare startups away from defense work?
one_liner: The Equity podcast on TechCrunch explored the potential chilling effect of the Pentagon's Anthropic controversy on startups considering government contracts.

title: Google BigQuery Previews Cross-Region SQL Queries for Distributed Data
one_liner: Google Cloud's BigQuery now supports running SQL queries across datasets stored in different geographic regions, directly.

title: Google's new command-line tool can plug OpenClaw into your Workspace data
one_liner: OpenClaw allows users to manage and access data across various Google Workspace applications like Drive, Gmail, and Calendar through a unified command-line interface.

title: LWiAI Podcast #235 - Sonnet 4.6, Deep-thinking tokens, Anthropic vs Pentagon
one_liner: Sonnet 4.6 doubles the speed and halves the price of its predecessor, Claude 3 Opus, and is available in the API.

title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
one_liner: Balyasny's AI research system incorporates GPT models, custom model evaluations, and agent workflows to analyse investments.

title: AutoGPT
one_liner: The Auto-GPT repo gained significant traction, becoming one of the most starred AI projects on GitHub.

title: system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
one_liner: The GitHub repo includes system prompts for tools like Claude Code and Perplexity, offering insight into their design.

title: openclaw
one_liner: OpenClaw is a self-hosted personal AI assistant that connects to 20+ messaging platforms via a local Gateway control plane

title: Write C Code Without Learning C: The Magic of PythoC
one_liner: The Write tutorial goes deep enough to be useful, not just introductory.

title: Grammarly is using our identities without permission
one_liner: Grammarlys boss, as experts without their knowledge or permission, according to a Wired report.

title: Beyond Accuracy: Quantifying the Production Fragility Caused by Excessive, Redundant, and Low-Signal Features in Regression
one_liner: The study found that models with many features are more vulnerable to data pipeline failures and external system dependencies, leading to increased maintenance overhead.

title: Introducing Modular Diffusers - Composable Building Blocks for Diffusion Pipelines
one_liner: Modular Diffusers allows developers to mix and match pre-built blocks to create custom workflows, offering an alternative to monolithic pipelines.

title: This Jammer Wants to Block Always-Listening AI Wearables. It Probably Won’t Work
one_liner: Spectre I attempts to counter ambient AI surveillance by emitting disruptive signals, but its effectiveness is limited by the power required to overcome diverse device microphones in varying environments.

title: I Built an Agent Skill That Generates Full Videos From a Topic Name
one_liner: The custom agent uses Flux for image generation on a local GPU and Chatterbox TTS for voiceover, orchestrated to produce videos from just a topic name.

title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
one_liner: SpeciesNet uses a semi-supervised learning approach, pre-trained on a large dataset of labeled images and then fine-tuned with a smaller set of expert-labeled images.

title: Online harassment is entering its AI era
one_liner: Generative AI tools are making online harassment cheaper and more scalable — deepfake images
column6: and automated abuse campaigns now require minimal technical skill to deploy.
